title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura seeks Shukracharya's blessings for war against Lord Shiva, but Shukracharya warns of dire consequences. Will Tarakasura heed the warning or proceed with his plans?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Karthikeya, with his powerful spear in hand, commands the army of Devas to face Tarakasura and his legion of Asuras. How will the battle unfold between the Devas and Asuras?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: While Abhimanyu reconsiders his decision of participating in the competition, Sunil takes his name off the competition upon disapproval from his father. Later, Latika stresses over her father's retirement and seeks Abhimanyu's help.

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Abhimanyu is in a dilemma to inform Appa about his participation in the contest. Later, Abhimanyu confesses the truth to Ashutosh that he has already registered for the competition, and asks him to convince Appa for the same. Will Ashutosh comply?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: As Abhimanyu starts preparing for the competition, Daulatrao's father has different plans for his son upon winning the competition. Meanwhile, Uttamrao suspects something is going on with Abhimanyu. What challenges lie in front of Abhimanyu?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Marred by Daulatrao's warning, Latika provides her full support to Abhimanyu and tries to help him in every way possible. However, things take a drastic turn when Abhimanyu wakes Latika up to start her training along with him.

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Abhimanyu is determined to win the competition and Latika accompanies him on his workout. Meanwhile, when Daulatrao humiliates Latika for her physique, she receives an interesting offer from the ad agency. Will Latika pose as a model?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Sajjan convinces Abhimanyu to speak with Latika about the modelling offer. Meanwhile, Kamini resorts to body shaming and humiliates Latika in front of the trainees. Will Latika retaliate against this demeaning act?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Abhimanyu criticises Kamini, Hema and the trainees for humiliating Latika. Later, he motivates Latika to apply for the modelling assignment and set an example for the community. Will Latika consider the advice and take a leap of faith into modelling?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Rathnappa visits Niranjan's house and informs him that Chandu's assistants came in search of Shantharaju twice. Niranjan realizes that if Chandu is searching for his father, then he did not help him escape.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Madhukar sees Janaki near the market, but she goes away before he could speak to her. He informs this to CSP and Shyamala who feel that it may not be Janaki. Will CSP realize that it is Janaki that Madhukar saw?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: A Kannada drama about Janaki, a woman facing personal struggles, love conflicts, and family expectations while she strives to protect her dignity and make her place in the world.

title: Jana Gana Mana
subTitle: Jhansi, a talented police officer, embarks on a battle against one of the most notorious criminals in Madikeri. Despite several obstacles in her way, she resolves to bring justice and solve the crime by the book.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Lalithamba lets her cousin, Manju, stay in her house while he looks for a job. However, Vitthal is bothered by Manju's presence.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Lalithamba decides to stand for the housing board elections and urges her family to support her. However, Vitthal and Silli support Lalithamba's opponent.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Don Pakku's men panic when he suffers from a gunshot wound. Soon, they kidnap Vitthal to help their boss.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal becomes overwhelmed by his problems and looks for an escape. Soon, the skeleton in his office gives him the perfect solution.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: When Pandu's first love pays him a visit, he asks her to stay. However, after she refuses, the family tries to persuade her.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: When the wedding lights go missing, Pandu and Punda decide to search for them. Simultaneously, they attempt to impress Srihari with their endeavour.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Pandu decides to marry Srilakshmi against his family's disapproval. However, their marital union faces unexpected trials ahead.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Pandu and Srilakshmi's romance causes tension at home when it leads to a house transfer. As a result, Pandu begins to question her motives.

title: Naga Kannike
subTitle: Yuvjraj's wedding quickly unfolds into a quest to find the killer. Later, a crucial clue points towards Vish's direction.

title: Jana Gana Mana
subTitle: Jhansi, a talented police officer, embarks on a battle against one of the most notorious criminals in Madikeri. Despite several obstacles in her way, she resolves to bring justice and solve the crime by the book.

subTitle: A young Manu's life changes after marrying the maharaja of Jhansi. Later, she becomes a warrior queen, determined to combat British rule in India.

subTitle: Sakthi is blessed with powers from the Goddess JAGANMATHE. Adored by the villagers for her abilities, she has grown up under the strict watch of her sister, who is her total opposite. Her life takes a turn when she meets an atheist doctor.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: As the hearing continues in the court, CSP argues that Varun Vaibhav should undergo a DNA test to ascertain that he is Inchara's father. However, Sheela Bhushan makes a compelling argument against it.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Janaki is shocked when Madhukar informs her about Varun Vaibhav's fat cheque and the ill intention behind it. However, he also reveals that Sheela Bhushan suggested that he use that money to help the people in need.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Silli becomes obsessed with Chilli Khaara and gets sidetracked by her new distraction. However, this new obsession puts her life in danger.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal's life changes when a child arrives at his doorstep and claims to be his son. Soon, the family attempts to cope with the new revelation.

subTitle: Pandu is in for a roller-coaster ride when his controlling wife meets his equally dominant daughter-in-law.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Madhukar goes to Mythri's room to take some files and during his search, he notices Dhatri's childhood photograph on the table. He wonders how Mythri owned the photograph that Shyamala had and takes it along with him.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Shyamala is surprised to see Dhatri's photos on her table and learns that Madhukar brought it from Mythri's room. She calls Janaki and reveals the story behind the photo and informs she had only one copy.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Karthikeya engages in a fierce battle against Tarakasura and his army, exerting all his efforts to defeat them. Meanwhile, Tarakasura devises a plan to kill Karthikeya by dispatching his most formidable Asura warriors.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Karthikeya feels helpless as Tarakasura and his army launch a fierce attack on the battlefield. Concerned for his son's safety, Lord Shiva instructs Veerabhadra to assist Karthikeya in winning the war. Can Veerabhadra successfully aid Karthikeya.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Chakor, a young girl, who was kept as a collateral for money before she was born grows up into a free-spirited athlete. She raises her voice against the system of bonded labour in her village.

title: Chakori
subTitle: The Sitapur police make Bhuvan put his thumb impression on a blank paper to use as proof against Ishwar.

title: Chakori
subTitle: After traveling to Azadganj, Vivaan gets a helping hand from Manohar. Katsuri and Bhuvan are surprised to know about Imli's action.

title: Chakori
subTitle: After winning the elections, Kamal Narayan is welcomed at home by his family amidst celebrations. The farmers of the village, on the other hand, are struggling on Narayan's silk farms.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Kasturi and Bhuvan reluctantly mortgage the baby. Later, Haria passes away and the 'pandit' warns them that if they do not get a cow soon, Haria will go to hell.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Janaki talks to Shankar Devaghatta and helps Sanjana get a job in the same school. As a token of gratitude, Sanjana invites Janaki to come home for a family lunch. Will Janaki accept the invitation? Watch the full episode to know more!

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Janaki is on her way to Sajana's home. Niranjan gets an emergency call and has to go out of station immediately. Will Janaki and Niranjan meet? Watch the full episode to know more now.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Shankar Devaghatta family goes for a trip leaving Janaki alone at home. Janaki hears someone knocking on the door during the night and gets afraid. Who is this person knocking? Is Janaki in some kind of trouble?

subTitle: A village living in harmony faces challenges when politicians try to divide the people based on caste. Subsequently, female villagers take up the task of fighting the oppressors.

subTitle: Govinda becomes concerned when Vittal suddenly falls ill. Soon, Lalithamba and Srilatha argue about the right treatment.

subTitle: Vittal ignores Lalithamba's advice and skips breakfast to see a patient. Soon, Lalithamba decides to get her revenge.

subTitle: Lalithamba is furious when Srilatha comments about her appearance. Soon, Ranganath and Vishalu suggest a bizarre way for Lalithamba to feel younger.

subTitle: After a prolonged battle, Karthikeya eventually utilizes his divine weapon to defeat Tarakasura. Witnessing her husband's defeat, Tarakasura's wife breaks into tears and implores Karthikeya to end her life as well.

subTitle: Shyamala informs CSP that Janaki is not at Chandu's house and even Rashmi is not aware about her whereabouts. She also informs CSP about Janaki-Niranjan's divorce. As per Shyamala's suggestion, CSP calls Shankar Devaghatta to enquire about Janaki.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Chandu meets Suhas and conspires to take control over the school. In a turn of events, Chandu visits Devagatta's house to collect the documents related to the school. With Janaki having taken shelter in the same place, will Chandu come across her?

subTitle: Chandu meets Janaki and learns that she is working as Shankar Devagatta's assistant in his school. To avoid damaging his reputation, Chandu offers Janaki a job in his firm. Will Janaki accept the offer and agree to work for him?

subTitle: A patient reveals a new form of payment to Vittal. Soon, Vittal realises he can make a big profit from this information.

subTitle: Janaki's real parents call her and request to see her. She gets tired of making excuses and agrees to meet them. But, she puts forth the condition that she will call them only when nobody else is home.
